projectDescription: Add first-class GCP Terraform support for Trustgrid deployments with a single node module supporting manual/auto registration, plus IAM/firewall helper modules and production-ready examples.

ticket.title: Create TF modules for Google Cloud (GCP)

requirements: Single node module supports both manual and auto registration
License optional in manual mode and required+validated in auto mode
Main module consumes existing network resources
Public exposure modes: direct_static_ip (default), byo_public_ip, private_only
Gateway ingress via direct public IP in v1 (no LB)
Preserve public IP for redeploy stability
Registration key supported as sensitive variable
Service account helper module (outside main module)
IAM helper module for HA route management
Main module does not manage firewall rules; helper modules do
Production image defaults with override and explicit pinning support

userStories.title: Single module for manual+auto registration
acceptanceCriteria: registration_mode supports manual and auto
license optional in manual mode
license required/validated in auto mode
registration_key input is sensitive

userStories.title: Public exposure modes and redeploy IP stability
acceptanceCriteria: Supports direct_static_ip, byo_public_ip, private_only
Default is direct_static_ip
Public IP stability objective met for redeploy in default mode
No LB requirement in v1

userStories.title: Externalized network and firewall ownership
acceptanceCriteria: Main module consumes existing subnet/VPC resources
Main module does not create firewall rules
Firewall helpers provide least-privilege mgmt/gateway patterns

userStories.title: IAM helper modules for identity and HA routes
acceptanceCriteria: Service account helper creates account and outputs email
Route role helper creates role/binding for HA route management
Main module accepts service_account_email and creates no service account

userStories.title: Image defaults and override controls
acceptanceCriteria: Default image points to production Trustgrid project/family
Supports project/family override for test variants
Supports explicit image pinning

userStories.title: Examples for onboarding and HA
acceptanceCriteria: single-node-manual example exists
single-node-auto example exists
dual-node-ha example exists using IAM helper

testPlan: Run terraform fmt -recursive in gcp tree
Run terraform init -backend=false && terraform validate in each new module
Run terraform init -backend=false && terraform validate in each new example
Negative validation test: auto mode without license fails
Negative validation test: invalid exposure mode fails
Static check: main module does not include firewall or service-account resources
Static check: dual NIC and can_ip_forward=true are present
risksAssumptions: Least-privilege HA route IAM actions may require refinement after live failover tests
Control-plane egress destination list may evolve and should be extensible
Trustgrid image project/family IDs are assumed available to deployment principals
